# COPILOT INSTRUCTIONS

## Main Rules

- Main directory: the root of this repository.
- Assume CLI commands are run from the repository root (do not hardcode absolute paths).
- Don't change anything in the `ui/` folder, use it as a reference only.


## Commenting

- Don't "overcomment", add comments only to complex code.
- Don't install unnecessary packages, if something can be done within this project instead on installing a package - prefer a code-change.

## Documenting

- Don't overload with explanations.
- Use KISS method.
